---
title: Distinct North American Cooling Signatures Following the Zonally Symmetric
  and Asymmetric Modes of Winter Stratospheric Variability
pagetitle: 2022-3-1-Ding2022 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2022
author: Xiuyuan Ding, Gang Chen, Lantao Sun and Pengfei Zhang
venue: Geophysical Research Letters
venue_cit: <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 49, doi:10.1029/2021GL096076.
recommended_citation: 'Xiuyuan Ding, Gang Chen, Lantao Sun and Pengfei Zhang, 2022:
  Distinct North American Cooling Signatures Following the Zonally Symmetric and Asymmetric
  Modes of Winter Stratospheric Variability, <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>,
  49, doi:10.1029/2021GL096076.'
paper_url: https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1029/2021GL096076
slides_url: /files/slides/2022-3-1-Ding2022.pdf
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Distinct North American Cooling Signatures Following the Zonally Symmetric and Asymmetric Modes of Winter Stratospheric Variability

*Published in Geophysical Research Letters, 2022*

**Recommended citation:** Xiuyuan Ding, Gang Chen, Lantao Sun and Pengfei Zhang, 2022: Distinct North American Cooling Signatures Following the Zonally Symmetric and Asymmetric Modes of Winter Stratospheric Variability, <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 49, doi:10.1029/2021GL096076.

[Download paper](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1029/2021GL096076){target="_blank"}

[Slides](/files/slides/2022-3-1-Ding2022.pdf){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
